title: Chytraculia cubensis
taxonomy: Chytraculia cubensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the tribe Heliantheae and is native to Cuba. Chytraculia cubensis is a rare and endangered species. The plant is known to grow in dry scrublands and rocky outcrops. Further classification and research may be needed to fully understand its taxonomic position.
